name: Pumpkin Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Heat milk in a heavy 1-quart saucepan until hot, but not boiling.
3. Mix pumpkin, brown sugar, 2 tablespoons syrup, cinnamon, ginger, eggs, and egg whites in a large bowl until smooth.
4. Stir in hot milk.
5. Divide the mixture evenly among six ungreased 10-ounce custard cups.
6. Place the cups in a rectangular pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches) on the oven rack.
7. Pour very hot water into the pan, up to 1 inch below the tops of the cups.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean. Let cool.
9. Cook raisins over medium heat until they are soft. Serve with custard. Makes 6 servings.
